meta.name: @elonmusk
meta.note: Evidence-based ranges from live web research, verified by an adversarial checker. Most are low-confidence; net worth is rarely public.

owner.name: Elon Musk
owner.headline: CEO of Tesla and SpaceX/xAI; world's richest person, briefly the first-ever trillionaire after SpaceX's June 2026 IPO before a pullback

people.name: claudio pracownik
people.headline: Brazilian financial executive; former Partner/COO at BTG Pactual, CEO of Genial Investimentos, CFO at Flamengo; CEO of Win the Game sports finance JV

people.name: Erik Barmack
people.headline: Founder & CEO of Wild Sheep Content; former VP Head of International Originals at Netflix (8+ years); oversaw The Witcher, La Casa de Papel, and Netflix's anime initiative

people.name: 上野 宗一郎｜IDDK CEO
people.headline: Founder and CEO of IDDK Co., Ltd. — Toshiba spinout developing lensless semiconductor microscopy (MID) technology for space and field applications
